title: Czech Addon for TrainCraft
description: This mod addes a ton of new trains and carts to Minecraft mainly from the Czech Republic and Slovakia. it is the first addon for traincraft ever made.
body:
This mod addes a ton of new trains and carts to Minecraft mainly from the Czech Republic and Slovakia. it is the first addon for traincraft ever made.

Me, tpeterka1 and HajdaM were able to make changes to TrainCraft so now it supports addons check their [GitHub](https://github.com/EternalBlueFlame/Traincraft-5/tree/TC4.5-1.7.10).

This Addon was made specifically for the Ctyrk4 Community Server which you can check out [here](https://discord.com/invite/kfv2kpuezU).

Some trains are only retextured ones from the official TrainCraft, all these models have been used with permission. The list can be found [here](https://github.com/Petsox/Ctyrk4-Addon-TCCE/blob/master/Models.md).

Big thanks goes to everyone active in our community who made skins/models etc... Without these people our addon could not exist.

If you would like to contribute the best way to do so is to join our [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/kfv2kpuezU)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Requires TrainCraft 7.1 and above.
